textByHash.ce14b8259b84b3a20f61911d0d6843c2caad9c52: Greetings and welcome to my pickaxe shop. Do you want to buy my premium quality pickaxes?
textByHash.c73bc07f894334bca80bbc04b011bc4a1f18e24a: Of course they are! My pickaxes are made of higher grade metal than your ordinary bronze pickaxes, allowing you to mine that ore just a little bit faster than normal.
textByHash.cf238575e0b7c99a3acb0736ee7898b31b7c6669: Oh, a dragon pickaxe! And a broken one at that. I haven't seen one of those in a while.
textByHash.ac3ba440569541d0d815917f8bd7d7a8e5bc0912: I did indeed fix pickaxes in the past, many years ago. They were a lot more common back then.
textByHash.fdf81bb77a57d51435b1ce3c5fc2199496001b1c: In fact, this is the first broken pickaxe I've seen in a very long time!
textByHash.ea2a7ed654c23a994683625ba9fe1fc82bae3312: Ore rocks used to be quite unstable. They would randomly explode when you were mining them.
textByHash.b000f91406a4c4c6e7de3d5af6c998896f0ffba7: It was. But then one day, the explosions just... stopped. As if someone flipped an off switch somewhere.
textByHash.7b3f16f8c12353a563ee1acc9c106482c699ba68: I've not seen a broken pickaxe since then!
textByHash.0a0a53ab504824bf8ea7ff75d21d472b577ca6fa: I should think so. I'll need to buy some new tools.
textByHash.ffc92ec0b2c33142a3f72423987f87ba8b6b6307: They're quite expensive, but they will get the job done. The pickaxe will be as good as new when I've finished with it.
textByHash.2edfca088d321cf986695bdb8c0f2c4f874fee95: ...let me see. I need another one of these, and I can reuse that if I replace the drill bit from there...
textByHash.165239af5fa6470844bb0552c7fd31a0c9e20f7f: ...hmm, and this needs a full clean, oh and I don't have one of those anymore...
textByHash.e08da6707356d9887bcb699ebb3d996ab4dc7175: ...okay! It'll cost about 2,500,000 GP, give or take a few coins. Would you like me to fix it for you?
textByHash.f904e10e971ae8f05e1ffaa04a733de1367a57aa: Lovely! Okay, give me a moment. It may take a little while, it's a tough metal to work with.
textByHash.baa77b5aeb422bccb6f8596fdc51f7f1ffd9a6ae: There you go, good as new, just like I said!
textByHash.0dfa112254dfd7f1fbae207e9b5262eeb28a8aaa: It is! But you can't cheap out on quality. If a job's worth doing, do it well.
textByHash.41bc8b0cf2ffc4eaff263ae4c95a32a7b5afec50: I'm also the only one who can repair pickaxes these days, so you don't really have much choice!
